basic_details.job_title: ESIC Senior Resident Recruitment 2026 -Walkin for 20 Posts
basic_details.short_information: ESIC Senior Resident Recruitment 2026 has been announced through Short Notice No. 03 of Advertisement No. 01/2026, inviting eligible doctors for a walk-in interview on 23 July 2026 (Thursday) at ESIC Model Hospital, Naroda-Bapunagar, Ahmedabad, Gujarat. This recruitment drive is being conducted to fill 20 Senior Resident posts under the Residency Scheme across departments such as Anesthesiology, General Medicine, General Surgery, ICU, PICU, NICU, Radiology, and more.

important_dates.raw: Notice Issue Date: 10 July 2026 Walk-in Interview Date: 23 July 2026 (Thursday) Reporting Time for Document Verification: 9:30 AM onwards Last Time for Entry: 10:00 AM (applications/candidates after this time will not be entertained)

application_fee.details: UR and OBC category candidates must deposit a Demand Draft (non-refundable) of Rs. 500/- in favour of "ESIC Fund Account No. 1", payable at Ahmedabad, at the time of the interview. SC/ST/PwBD/Female candidates are exempted from paying the application fee.

age_limit.details: Maximum age: 45 years as on the date of the interview. Age relaxation: 3 years for OBC candidates and 5 years for SC/ST candidates.

qualification.details: MBBS with a Postgraduate (PG) Degree / DNB / Diploma in the concerned specialty from a Government-recognized university or college. Candidates must be registered with the Gujarat Medical Council or the National Medical Commission (NMC). Candidates registered in another state must get registered with the Gujarat Medical Council at the time of joining. For the Senior Resident (Nephrology) post specifically, the qualification is MBBS with PG Degree / DNB / Diploma in Medicine or Pediatrics from a Government-recognized institution. Preference will be given to candidates holding a DM/DNB in Nephrology. | Maximum age: 45 years as on the date of the interview. Age relaxation: 3 years for OBC candidates and 5 years for SC/ST candidates.

salary_details.details: Selected candidates will receive a Basic Pay of Rs. 67,700/- under Level-11, Index-1 of the Pay Matrix (equivalent to the pre-revised Basic Pay of Rs. 18,750/- in PB-3 with Grade Pay Rs. 6,600/-), along with allowances applicable under ESIC rules and the Senior Residency Scheme.

selection_process: Candidates must report at the Conference Hall (2nd Floor)

at 9:30 AM on 23 July 2026 for document verification. Only candidates who clear document verification will be permitted to appear before the interview panel. Selection is made purely through a walk-in interview; there is no written examination. Applicants must report by 10:00 AM; entries after this time will not be entertained.
how_to_apply: This is a walk-in interview, so there is no online application process. Interested and eligible candidates should directly report in person to the office of the Medical Superintendent, ESIC Model Hospital, Bapunagar, Ahmedabad, Gujarat, on 23 July 2026, along with all original documents, photocopies, and the applicable Demand Draft.
important_instructions: The Senior Residency tenure is for a total of 3 years, including any prior ad-hoc or regular SR service in a government institution. Appointment is initially for one year, extendable annually upon satisfactory performance review. Selected candidates must pay a Security Deposit of Rs. 30,000/- and execute an agreement on a Rs. 300/- Non-Judicial Stamp Paper at the time of joining. No service benefits such as PF, Pension, Gratuity, Medical Allowance, Seniority, Promotion, or Leave will be admissible. No TA/DA will be paid for attending the interview or for joining. Private practice of any kind is not allowed. Candidates who have already completed 3 years of Senior Residency in any government hospital are not eligible to apply under this scheme. Resignation requires 1 month's notice period or pay in lieu thereof. Hostel accommodation or staff quarters will not be provided. Vacancies are subject to change at the time of the interview, based on actual requirement. The Dean, ESIC Medical College and Hospital, Naroda-Bapunagar, Ahmedabad, reserves the right to fill all, some, or none of the posts without assigning any reason.

content_sections.heading: ESIC Senior Resident Recruitment 2026 Overview Table

rows.details: ESIC Model Hospital and Medical College, Naroda-Bapunagar, Ahmedabad, Gujarat
Short Notice No. 03 of Advt No. 01/2026

content_sections.heading: Important Dates for ESIC Senior Resident Recruitment 2026
content_sections.text: Notice Issue Date: 10 July 2026 Walk-in Interview Date: 23 July 2026 (Thursday) Reporting Time for Document Verification: 9:30 AM onwards Last Time for Entry: 10:00 AM (applications/candidates after this time will not be entertained)

content_sections.heading: ESIC Senior Resident Vacancy Details 2026
content_sections.text: The total number of Senior Resident vacancies is 20, distributed across the following departments and categories: Category-wise total break-up: 4 UR, 2 EWS, 7 OBC, 3 SC, and 4 ST. Additionally, 1 vacancy is reserved for PwBD (Persons with Benchmark Disabilities) candidates, adjustable against the respective category vacancy. Note: Vacancies are subject to change at the time of the interview, depending on actual requirements, as stated in the official notice.

content_sections.heading: Eligibility Criteria for ESIC Senior Resident Recruitment
content_sections.text: MBBS with a Postgraduate (PG) Degree / DNB / Diploma in the concerned specialty from a Government-recognized university or college. Candidates must be registered with the Gujarat Medical Council or the National Medical Commission (NMC). Candidates registered in another state must get registered with the Gujarat Medical Council at the time of joining. For the Senior Resident (Nephrology) post specifically, the qualification is MBBS with PG Degree / DNB / Diploma in Medicine or Pediatrics from a Government-recognized institution. Preference will be given to candidates holding a DM/DNB in Nephrology. Maximum age: 45 years as on the date of the interview. Age relaxation: 3 years for OBC candidates and 5 years for SC/ST candidates.

content_sections.heading: ESIC Senior Resident Salary / Pay Scale 2026
content_sections.text: Selected candidates will receive a Basic Pay of Rs. 67,700/- under Level-11, Index-1 of the Pay Matrix (equivalent to the pre-revised Basic Pay of Rs. 18,750/- in PB-3 with Grade Pay Rs. 6,600/-), along with allowances applicable under ESIC rules and the Senior Residency Scheme.

content_sections.heading: Application Fee for ESIC Senior Resident Recruitment
content_sections.text: UR and OBC category candidates must deposit a Demand Draft (non-refundable) of Rs. 500/- in favour of "ESIC Fund Account No. 1", payable at Ahmedabad, at the time of the interview. SC/ST/PwBD/Female candidates are exempted from paying the application fee.

content_sections.heading: Selection Process
content_sections.text: Candidates must report at the Conference Hall (2nd Floor), ESIC Model Hospital, Bapunagar, Ahmedabad, at 9:30 AM on 23 July 2026 for document verification. Only candidates who clear document verification will be permitted to appear before the interview panel. Selection is made purely through a walk-in interview; there is no written examination. Applicants must report by 10:00 AM; entries after this time will not be entertained.

content_sections.heading: Required Documents for the Interview
content_sections.text: Original and photocopies of MBBS and PG Degree/DNB/Diploma certificates Gujarat Medical Council or National Medical Commission registration certificate Original category certificate (SC/ST/OBC/EWS) in the prescribed Government of India format, wherever applicable OBC-NCL certificate (valid, as per the latest DOPT format) for candidates claiming OBC reservation PwBD certificate, if applicable No Objection Certificate (NOC) from the current employer, for candidates already working in a Government or Private hospital/institute Proof of age, identity, and address Demand Draft of Rs. 500/- (for UR/OBC candidates only)

content_sections.heading: How to Apply for ESIC Senior Resident Recruitment 2026
content_sections.text: This is a walk-in interview, so there is no online application process. Interested and eligible candidates should directly report in person to the office of the Medical Superintendent, ESIC Model Hospital, Bapunagar, Ahmedabad, Gujarat, on 23 July 2026, along with all original documents, photocopies, and the applicable Demand Draft.

content_sections.heading: Important Instructions
content_sections.text: The Senior Residency tenure is for a total of 3 years, including any prior ad-hoc or regular SR service in a government institution. Appointment is initially for one year, extendable annually upon satisfactory performance review. Selected candidates must pay a Security Deposit of Rs. 30,000/- and execute an agreement on a Rs. 300/- Non-Judicial Stamp Paper at the time of joining. No service benefits such as PF, Pension, Gratuity, Medical Allowance, Seniority, Promotion, or Leave will be admissible. No TA/DA will be paid for attending the interview or for joining. Private practice of any kind is not allowed. Candidates who have already completed 3 years of Senior Residency in any government hospital are not eligible to apply under this scheme. Resignation requires 1 month's notice period or pay in lieu thereof. Hostel accommodation or staff quarters will not be provided. Vacancies are subject to change at the time of the interview, based on actual requirement. The Dean, ESIC Medical College and Hospital, Naroda-Bapunagar, Ahmedabad, reserves the right to fill all, some, or none of the posts without assigning any reason.

faq.question: Q1. What is the last date for the ESIC Senior Resident walk-in interview 2026?
faq.answer: The walk-in interview for ESIC Senior Resident Recruitment 2026 is scheduled for 23 July 2026 (Thursday) at ESIC Model Hospital, Naroda-Bapunagar, Ahmedabad.

faq.question: Q2. How many vacancies are available in ESIC Senior Resident Recruitment 2026?
faq.answer: There are a total of 20 vacancies across departments including Anesthesiology, General Medicine, General Surgery, ICU, PICU, NICU, Nephrology, Microbiology, Medical Oncology, Pharmacology, Forensic Medicine & Toxicology, and Radiology.

faq.question: Q3. What is the age limit for ESIC Senior Resident posts?
faq.answer: The maximum age limit is 45 years as on the interview date, with a relaxation of 3 years for OBC and 5 years for SC/ST candidates.

faq.question: Q4. What is the salary for ESIC Senior Resident?
faq.answer: Selected candidates will get a Basic Pay of Rs. 67,700/- under Level-11, Index-1 of the Pay Matrix, along with applicable allowances.

faq.question: Q5. Is there an application fee for this recruitment?
faq.answer: Yes, UR and OBC candidates must pay Rs. 500/- through a Demand Draft. SC/ST/PwBD/Female candidates are exempted from the fee.

faq.question: Q6. What is the required qualification for ESIC Senior Resident posts?
faq.answer: Candidates need an MBBS with a PG Degree/DNB/Diploma in the concerned specialty from a Government-recognized institution, along with registration with the Gujarat Medical Council or National Medical Commission.

faq.question: Q7. Is this recruitment through online application or walk-in interview?
faq.answer: This recruitment is conducted entirely through a walk-in interview; there is no online application process.

faq.question: Q8. What is the tenure of the Senior Resident post?
faq.answer: The tenure is for a total of 3 years, including any earlier ad-hoc or regular SR service, with appointment initially for one year and annual extensions subject to satisfactory performance.

faq.question: What is the last date for the ESIC Senior Resident walk-in interview 2026?
faq.answer: The walk-in interview for ESIC Senior Resident Recruitment 2026 is scheduled for 23 July 2026 (Thursday) at ESIC Model Hospital, Naroda-Bapunagar, Ahmedabad.
